name: curcumin
mechanism: Pleiotropic anti-inflammatory polyphenol associated with suppression of NF-kB and other inflammatory signaling; many reported targets exist, but oral PK limitations complicate translation.
contraindications: piperine-containing products may materially increase exposure
summary: Pleiotropic anti-inflammatory polyphenol associated with suppression of NF-kB and other inflammatory signaling; many reported targets exist, but oral PK limitations complicate translation.
